title: The Neighbor Who Watched Everyone
content: People often noticed the elderly man sitting by his front window for hours every afternoon. He rarely left the house and seemed to observe everything happening on the street. Children believed he was watching everyone for mysterious reasons. One day, a new family introduced themselves to him and discovered the truth. The man had worked as a photographer for many years before losing part of his mobility. Watching the neighborhood had become his way of staying connected with the community. He knew everyone's names because he enjoyed greeting people and quietly documenting daily life through photographs taken from his window.
